title: Adani Power Board Meeting April 29, 2026 for Audited Q4FY26 Results - scanx.trade
content:
Adani Power Board Meeting April 29, 2026 for Audited Q4FY26 Results
Adani Power Limited announced board meeting on April 29, 2026 to approve audited financial results for Q4FY26. The company implemented trading window closure from April 1, 2026 under SEBI insider trading regulations, with reopening 48 hours after results. An investor call is scheduled for the same day to discuss results and business outlook.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
Adani Power Limited has formally announced that its board of directors will convene on April 29, 2026, to consider and approve the company's audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The power generation company communicated this information to both BSE and NSE on April 7, 2026, in compliance with regulatory requirements.
Board Meeting and Results Approval
The scheduled board meeting represents a crucial corporate governance milestone where directors will review the company's audited financial performance for Q4FY26. The meeting will examine comprehensive financial metrics, operational achievements, and strategic developments that occurred during the fourth quarter and full financial year.
Trading Window Restrictions
As part of insider trading prevention measures, Adani Power has implemented a trading window closure for company securities. The trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the results announcement. This measure aligns with SEBI regulations and the company's internal code of conduct to ensure fair market practices.
Investor Engagement
The company has planned an investor and analyst call on April 29, 2026, coinciding with the results announcement. This call will provide stakeholders with detailed insights into the financial results and business outlook. Specific details regarding the call timing and access information will be published on the company's website at www.adanipower.com in due course.
Corporate Communication
The formal intimation was signed by Company Secretary Puneet Bansal and communicated to stock exchanges under the company's CIN L40100GJ1996PLC030533. The announcement follows established protocols for listed companies to maintain transparency with investors, analysts, and regulatory bodies regarding significant corporate events.
How might Adani Power's Q4FY26 results impact investor sentiment given the company's recent expansion into renewable energy segments?
Will the results announcement influence Adani Power's credit ratings and borrowing costs for upcoming capacity expansion projects?
Could strong financial performance in FY26 accelerate Adani Power's planned acquisitions or joint ventures in the power sector?
